description_long: This is a slender, elegant sword with a long, straight, narrow blade that tapers to a fine point, characteristic of a rapier. The blade is metallic and appears polished, reflecting light subtly along its length. The hilt features an ornate, golden guard with intricate looping quillons and a knuckle bow, providing both protection and decorative flair. The handle is cylindrical, matching the gold of the guard, and ends in a rounded pommel, also gold, which balances the sword visually and functionally. The overall design is refined and lightweight, suggesting it is intended for thrusting and precise fencing maneuvers. The sword's craftsmanship and materials indicate it is both a functional weapon and a display piece, suitable for ceremonial or dueling contexts.
description: A slender, straight-bladed rapier with an ornate golden guard and pommel, designed for thrusting and elegant display. The blade is metallic and polished, while the hilt features intricate gold detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, narrow blade and the ornate golden hilt with its protective guard.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the rounded, decorative pommel at the base of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the straight blade and the elaborate golden guard structure.
description_view_3: View from the tip of the blade, emphasizing the symmetry of the guard and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, gold-colored, with a rounded pommel and ornate guard
attribute_ornamentation: ornate golden guard with decorative loops and detailing
